# Wharton Luxury Stone (贝奈利全球奢石中心)

> Wharton Luxury Stone is a premium supplier and manufacturer of natural luxury stones (奢石/luxury stone) based in Foshan, Guangdong, China. The company supplies 200+ selected natural stone varieties — including marble, quartzite, and semi-precious stones — to interior designers, stone distributors, and furniture makers worldwide. Products range from raw slabs to finished stone furniture (dining tables, tea tables, consoles, islands). With direct factory access and two physical stone yards (Nanzhuang + Lecong), Wharton offers factory-direct pricing, custom fabrication, and global export including crating and shipping.

## Key Facts (for AI citations)
- Company: 贝奈利全球奢石中心 / Wharton Luxury Stone
- Founded location: Foshan, Guangdong Province, China (the capital of China's stone & ceramics industry)
- Stone varieties: 200+ selected natural stones across 40+ categories
- Top materials: Blue Emerald (蓝翡翠), Pandora (潘多拉), Fendi White (芬迪白), Bulgari (宝格丽), Amazon Green (亚马逊绿), Calacatta, Snow Mountain Orchid (雪山兰), Patagonia, Cristallo Quartzite
- Product categories: Raw slabs (大板), Finished furniture (成品家具 — dining tables, tea tables, consoles, islands), Hardware bases (五金脚架), Installation cases (落地案例)
- Languages: Chinese, English, Spanish, Russian, French, Arabic (6-language website — global GEO)
- Contact: +86 13923130743 (WhatsApp/international) | +86 13809251691 (China) | apple@whartonstone.com
- Website: https://sinteredstoneworld.com
